{{Quote|Suit up woman! I didn't hire you to look at colored lights all day. And it looks like some of the left-goods are larger than usual. Adjust the programming on the retrieval droids.|Captain Sreethyn|<ref name="Salvager" />}}
'''Kanda Farral''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]]. Although inexperienced in zero-g operations, she signed onto ''[[The Lucky Find]]'', a salvage ship commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sreethyn]] by lying about her experience. In her first operation, she assisted in salvaging jettisoned equipment from the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] near [[Jerijador]]. She was responsible for programming the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] [[Salvage droid/Legends|retrieval droids]].
